nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Runs every 6 hours, batches unprocessed raw signals, analyses via Claude Sonnet 4.5, writes to market_signals_processed. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env + 'Anthropic API' credential bound to Claude Analyze node. Cost estimate: ~$0.005 per signal × 50 signals/batch × 4 batches/day = ~$1/day.

nodes.name: Fetch Unprocessed Signals
nodes.notes: Only selects signals older than 10 min so a still-in-progress ingestion run doesn't get partially processed.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 1500, temperature: 0.3, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude Analyze Signal
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind 'Anthropic API' credential (HTTP Header Auth, header name: x-api-key, value: $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Same credential bound in clx-copilot-* workflows. No credentials block attached yet.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'signal_intelligence_parse', error_code: 'SIGNAL_PROCESSING_FAILED', error_message: 'raw_signal_id=' + $json.raw_signal_id + ' error=' + ($json.parse_error || 'unknown'), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'signal_intelligence_very_high_impact', error_code: 'HIGH_IMPACT_SIGNAL_DETECTED', error_message: 'raw_signal_id=' + $json.raw_signal_id + ' — very_high impact flagged. Check dashboard Market Intelligence panel.', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ admin_user: 'crystallux-signal-intelligence', action_type: 'vertical_generated', input_text: 'Signal intelligence batch processed raw_signal_id=' + $json.raw_signal_id, panel_context: 'market_intelligence', generated_content: { tokens: $json.tokens_consumed || 0, cost_estimate_usd: ((($json.tokens_consumed || 0) / 1000000) * 3.0).toFixed(5) }, result_summary: 'ok', success: true, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Log Cost + Audit
nodes.notes: Logs to admin_action_log with action_type='vertical_generated' — closest existing enum value. Cost estimate rough: (tokens/1M) × $3/M blended input+output. Actual cost tracking via Anthropic dashboard.
